title: Presentation Schema
description: Schema for defining UI presentation settings like locale, currency and number formatting

html_head_title.description: Text used as the <title> of the generated index.html.

locale.description: The BCP 47 language tag for the UI messages and defaults (e.g., 'en-GB').

number_locale.description: The BCP 47 language tag specifically for number and currency formatting (e.g., 'de-DE' for 1.234,56 format).

currency.description: The ISO 4217 currency code to be used in the application. Examples: 'EUR' for Euro (€), 'USD' for US Dollar ($), 'GBP' for British Pound (£).

menu.description: Custom left menu structure. If not provided, a flat list of all resources is shown.

authenticated_pages.description: Presentation page file patterns that require authentication. Patterns are relative to the presentation directory, such as 'pages/priv/**' or 'pages/report.jsx'.

list_field_rules_level_1.description: Base rules for field selection and ordering in list views. Keys can be concept names, 'prefix*', or '*'. Values are comma-separated rules applied to a pool of available fields (including 'id_presentation' and concept fields). Syntax: '*' (all pool fields), 'field' (add/move to end), 'prefix*' (add/move matches), '!field' (exclude), '!prefix*' (exclude matches). Range operators based on pool order: '>', '>=', '<', '<=' (include range), and negated '!>', '!>=', '!<', '!<=' (exclude range). Ordering: 'name[0]' (move to start), 'name[-1]' (move to end), 'name[prev]' (place after 'prev'). Cumulative Levels: L1 + L2 + L3. Defaults to {'*': '*,!id_presentation,!_*'}

list_field_rules_level_2.description: Rules overriding level 1 for which fields appear in the list view of each concept.

list_field_rules_level_3.description: Rules overriding level 2 for which fields appear in the list view of each concept.

list_sort.description: Default sort for list views. Keys are concept names, values are '<field> ASC|DESC' (e.g. 'id DESC' to show newest records first). Concepts without an entry keep the React-Admin default.

label.description: Display label for the menu item

concept.description: Name of the concept (resource) to link to. Required for leaf nodes.

workflow.description: Link to a built-in workflow task page: 'assignable_tasks' (unassigned records the user can claim or assign) or 'my_tasks' (records assigned to the user).
